BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $238.37 million in net inflows on April 20, 2026, extending a 5 consecutive day streak—the firmest institutional buying since February—and signaling strong demand amid BTC price gains to ~$78,500[1][3]. signals.headline: ETH ETFs 8-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETFs 8-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw $67.77 million net inflows on April 20, marking the 8th straight day, with weekly totals at $276 million led by Fidelity’s FETH[1][3]. Amid ETH price up ~3% to $2,395, this resolves inflow momentum questions and may impact markets predicting Ethereum rallies[1].
